name: prisma-mcp
description: Live API reference, guides, and plugin scaffolding for PrismaUI_F4, fetched from the Prisma2.0 GitHub repo.
long_description: Gives an AI assistant direct access to PrismaUI_F4's real API surface: every public method's signature and docs, the top-level guides (getting-started, examples, html-views, limitations, view-lifecycle, api-reference, 1.0-vs-2.0), the raw API header, and a tool that scaffolds a new plugin project from the official example. Everything is fetched live from prisma2/main at call time, so it never goes stale.

github_token.title: GitHub token (optional)
github_token.description: Raises GitHub's API rate limit from 60/hour to 5000/hour. Leave blank to use unauthenticated requests.

tools.name: list_api_methods
tools.description: List every public PrismaUI_F4 API method, optionally filtered by interface version.

tools.name: get_api_method
tools.description: Get full docs for one API method by name.

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Keyword search across every method doc and guide.

tools.name: get_guide
tools.description: Get the full text of one of the top-level guides.

tools.name: get_header
tools.description: Get the current PrismaUI_F4_API.h header, verbatim.

tools.name: scaffold_plugin
tools.description: Write a new, ready-to-build plugin project copied from the official example.
